'''Seft''' was a planet in the [[Genesia system/Legends|Genesia system]]. The system's largest [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]], Seft was orbited by six [[Moon/Legends|moons]] which had been stripped of all resources by the [[Lant Mining Corporation]]. LMC occasionally used the planet's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] gases for use in [[Genesia]]'s industrial plants.
